name: Financial Gravity Companies, Inc.
business: Financial Gravity Companies, Inc. supports investment advisors and provides tax professionals with a turnkey family office charter, helping them evolve into Family Office Directors. The company offers services including proactive tax planning, retirement and estate planning, wealth management, and risk mitigation. Its subsidiaries include Tax Master Network (TMN), Financial Gravity Family Office Services (FGFOS), Financial Gravity Asset Management (FGAM), Financial Gravity Enhanced Markets (FGEM), and Forta Financial Group (Forta, being discontinued).

exposures.sentence: TMN also provides CPAs, Enrolled Agents, and other tax professionals a system for marketing, selling, and fulfilling tax-planning engagements. The system rests on two proprietary SAAS-based applications, the Tax Ninja software, which uses non-technical language in written reports introducing clients to tax-saving concepts and strategies; and the Tax Operating System, which automates implementation of tax strategies.

Financial Gravity Enhanced Markets, LLC, formerly, MPath Advisor Resources, LLC ( FGEM ) is an insurance marketing organization and provides insurance products and services to insurance agents or agencies.

catalysts.event: Merger agreement with NCW Group, Inc.
catalysts.sentence: In March 1, 2021 Company entered into a merger agreement with NCW Group, Inc.
